Legal

Terms of Service

Last updated: May 18, 2025

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using aitoolsidea.com (the "Site"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, do not use the Site.

These Terms apply to all visitors, subscribers, and other users of the Site.

2. Description of Service

AI Tools Idea provides:

  • Independent reviews and comparisons of AI and software tools
  • Educational content about automation and productivity tools for businesses
  • A free email newsletter
  • Links to third-party products and services (some of which are affiliate links)

We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the Site at any time without notice.

3. Intellectual Property

Our content

All content on this Site — including articles, reviews, graphics, logos, and code — is the property of AI Tools Idea and is protected by applicable copyright, trademark, and intellectual property laws.

You may:

  • Share links to our articles
  • Quote brief excerpts (up to 100 words) with clear attribution and a link back to the original

You may not:

  • Copy or republish our articles in full without written permission
  • Scrape the Site for commercial purposes
  • Remove copyright or attribution notices
  • Use our trademarks or logos without express written permission

Your submissions

If you submit content to us (e.g. via contact forms or social media), you grant us a non-exclusive, royalty-free, worldwide licence to use, reproduce, and publish that content.

4. Affiliate Relationships

Some links on this Site are affiliate links. This means we may receive a commission if you click a link and make a purchase or sign up for a service — at no additional cost to you. See our full Affiliate Disclosure.

Affiliate relationships do not influence our editorial assessments. We only recommend tools we believe are genuinely useful.

5. Disclaimer of Warranties

The Site and its content are provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, express or implied, including but not limited to:

  • Accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of content
  • Fitness for a particular purpose
  • Uninterrupted or error-free access

Tool pricing, features, and availability change frequently. Always verify information directly with the tool provider before making purchasing decisions.

6. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, AI Tools Idea and its operators shall not be liable for:

  • Any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages
  • Loss of profits, data, or business opportunities
  • Damages arising from your use of or inability to use the Site
  • Decisions you make based on content published on the Site

Our total liability in any matter shall not exceed £100 (or the equivalent in your local currency).

7. Third-Party Links and Services

Our Site contains links to third-party websites. We do not endorse, control, or take responsibility for the content, privacy practices, or services of any linked site. Accessing third-party sites is at your own risk.

8. User Conduct

When using the Site, you agree not to:

  • Violate any applicable law or regulation
  • Infringe on intellectual property rights
  • Transmit spam, viruses, or malicious code
  • Attempt to gain unauthorised access to any part of the Site
  • Use the Site in any way that could damage, disable, or impair it

9. Newsletter and Email Communications

By subscribing to our newsletter, you consent to receive regular email communications from us. You may unsubscribe at any time via the unsubscribe link in any email we send.

We comply with applicable anti-spam laws including CAN-SPAM (US) and UK PECR.

10. Privacy

Your use of the Site is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated into these Terms by reference.

11. Changes to Terms

We may update these Terms at any time. Updated Terms will be posted on this page with a revised date. Your continued use of the Site after changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.

12. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of England and Wales. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of England and Wales.

13. Contact

For questions about these Terms, contact us at:

AI Tools Idea
Email: legal@aitoolsidea.com
Website: https://aitoolsidea.com
